HomeAboutServicesPricingHelpContact Customer Login

Four Service Lines. One Company That Cares.

Every service we offer exists because we saw a real problem going unsolved. No bundles, no upsells, no surprises.

$199/mo

White Glove Managed IT

Dedicated remote IT support, SLA-backed response, and real humans who know your systems before you call. One flat fee covers unlimited support, proactive monitoring, and security patching. No offshore call centers. No automated runaround. No surprise invoices.

Get Started →

What's included:

  • Remote monitoring 24/7
  • SLA-backed response times
  • Dedicated technician — same person every time
  • Proactive security patching
  • Security baseline hardening
  • No per-ticket fees — ever
$149/mo per device

Hardware-as-a-Service (HaaS)

Enterprise-grade refurbished hardware on a flat monthly subscription. We source, configure, deploy, and manage every device. When hardware ages out, we refresh it — and the old equipment is responsibly recycled, not landfilled. Zero e-waste from our clients, ever.

Get Started →

What's included:

  • Refurbished enterprise-grade hardware
  • Kecktech-branded device tags
  • Remote management included
  • Hardware refresh cycle included
  • Responsible recycling of aged-out devices
  • No upfront hardware purchase required
From $3,000

AI Custom App Development

Stop paying $800/mo for a stack of SaaS tools that don't talk to each other. We build a custom AI-powered application that replaces your subscriptions — and you own the code outright. No recurring license fees. Kansas-hosted on our own infrastructure. Most clients see ROI payback in under 18 months.

Start Your Project →

What's included:

  • Custom-built to your exact workflow
  • You own 100% of the code — forever
  • AI-powered automation built in
  • Kansas-hosted on Kecktech infrastructure
  • No recurring SaaS license fees
  • Built in weeks, not months
$79/mo

Senior Technology Concierge

Technology shouldn't be stressful. Our Senior Technology Concierge delivers scam-proof security, device setup, and monthly check-ins — in plain English, at your pace, with real dignity. We built this because Big Tech left seniors behind. We didn't.

Get Started →

What's included:

  • Scam & fraud protection setup
  • Device setup & optimization
  • Monthly wellness check-in calls
  • Plain-English support — no jargon, no rush
  • Remote access for quick fixes
  • Emergency tech card provided at onboarding

Not Sure Which Service Fits?

Tell us about your situation — we'll recommend the right fit with no pressure.

Talk to a Human →

Solar-Powered. Sovereign Data.
AI-Built Apps. Disability-Led. Human-Centered.
